# DIR.100 ? Support runtime reconfiguration

**Type:** DIRECTIVE
**Category:** general
**Subcategory:** umg_framework_directives
**Status:** active

## Summary
Support runtime reconfiguration

## Scope
Enable controlled reconfiguration of sleeves, stacks, and blocks over time

## Constraints
- Runtime changes must remain structured, auditable, and recoverable

## Tags
directive, umg-framework-directives
